On this page

Sphere models¶

This module may be employed to generate spheric models.

source_reconstruction.sphere_model.calculate_sphere_from_octahedron(level)¶
source_reconstruction.sphere_model.calculate_sphere_from_icosahedron(level)¶
source_reconstruction.sphere_model.read_sphere_from_icosahedron_in_fs_order(level)¶
source_reconstruction.sphere_model.prune_closeby_vert(vert, faces, threshold=1e-06)¶
source_reconstruction.sphere_model._tessellate_sphere(vert, faces, level)¶
